title: gutenbergia rangei
intro: Gutenbergia rangei is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Kenya. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gutenbergia rangei include the relief of fever, pain, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
